payload.label: chair
payload.short_description: dark wooden chair with black seat
payload.long_description: Partial, edge-cropped dark mahogany wooden chair with a glossy black leather seat cushion and ornate carved back; curved carved legs and stretcher bars are visible but partly cut off by the table and crop — appears close to the camera (approximately 0.5 m).
